summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EPIC3A (Costing - WAC + Margin) and EPIC3B (AR Receipts - Payment Application). Backend: 43/46 tests passed (93.5%). Frontend: All critical flows working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 404 (endpoint may not exist or different path)
minor_bugs.impact: Low - Sales RBAC test expected 403 but got 404

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 404 (endpoint may not exist or different path)
minor_bugs.impact: Low - Sales RBAC test expected 403 but got 404
Low - Documentation/test issue, correct path works fine

passed_tests: Authentication: All 4 roles (admin, manager, sales, warehouse) login successfully
EPIC3A Backend: GET /api/costing/wac returns correct data structure with all required fields (product_id, name, sku, category, wac, price, margin_amount, margin_pct, source, qty_on_hand)
EPIC3A Backend: Admin and Manager can access costing (200), Sales blocked (403)
EPIC3A Frontend: Navigation to 'Analitik (BI)' -> 'Margin & HPP' works
EPIC3A Frontend: Costing view renders with 4 KPI tiles and table with 7 products
EPIC3A Frontend: All table columns present (HPP/WAC, Harga Jual, Margin, colored Margin % badges, Source)
EPIC3A Frontend: Search functionality filters products correctly
EPIC3B Backend: GET /api/ar-receipts returns array with >=2 seeded receipts
EPIC3B Backend: GET /api/ar-receipts/open-orders returns open AR orders with outstanding
EPIC3B Backend: POST /api/ar-receipts creates receipt with auto FIFO allocation
EPIC3B Backend: POST /api/ar-receipts with explicit allocation works
EPIC3B Backend: Over-allocation returns 400 as expected
EPIC3B RBAC: Sales can GET and POST ar-receipts (200)
EPIC3B RBAC: Warehouse POST ar-receipts blocked (403)
EPIC3B Backend: Collection-reminders endpoint works
EPIC3B Frontend: Navigation to 'Penjualan' -> 'Pelanggan / CRM' -> 'Penagihan' tab works
EPIC3B Frontend: Collection worklist renders with 3 KPI tiles and 9 collection rows
EPIC3B Frontend: Payment button (collection-pay-{order_id}) opens AR Receipt Modal
EPIC3B Frontend: Modal has all required elements (method, date, auto/manual tabs, notes, submit)
EPIC3B Frontend: Open orders list shows 2 orders in modal
EPIC3B Frontend: Manual mode allocation inputs work (ar-receipt-alloc-{id})
EPIC3B Frontend: AR Receipts History table present
Regression: Orders view loads without errors
